title: Every person fulfills their roles well when they take pains over the d | Epictetus
description:
You're not one role — you're many, and each one comes with a debt. Which relationship are you currently underpaying?

#stoicism #epictetus #duty #justice #stoicphilosophy #stoic #dailystoic #character #virtue #selfdiscipline #philosophy
quote: Every person fulfills their roles well when they take pains over the duties they owe to others.
author: Epictetus
